rules/ commands/ skills/ ecc/" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="440" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lock" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;dashed=1;align=center;" value="skills-lock.json
